response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience but lacks the core requirements for this role. No recent professional C++ work since 2015 (brief stint at National Instruments), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain exposure. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which does not align with the mandatory C++ on Windows requirement.
strengths: Solid software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and testing expertise
Brief C/C++ experience at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (2014-2015), far below the 5-10 years required
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development experience

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows stack
